title: Consistent Naming: Withered
description: A simple pack that renames Wither Skeletons to Withered, finally matching the naming scheme of other undead mob variants! Husks, Strays, Drowned, and Bogged can all celebrate as Withered share their naming scheme after all this time!
body: A simple pack that renames Wither Skeletons to Withered, finally matching the naming scheme of other undead mob variants! Husks, Strays, Drowned, and Bogged can all celebrate as Withered share their naming scheme after all this time!
